EXPERIENCES.TITLE: Experiences and Adventures
EXPERIENCES.DESCRIPTION:
Discover Viñales with our exciting excursions: [horseback riding](/experiences/horseback-riding), [hiking](/experiences/hiking), [cycle tours](/experiences/cycle-tours), and [more](/experiences/other).
Unforgettable adventures in a unique natural environment await you!

ROOMS_HOME.TITLE:
Our
rooms
ROOMS_HOME.DESCRIPTION: Our five independent rooms offer privacy, private bathrooms, and access to various common areas, all in a setting surrounded by lush gardens and overlooking the imposing mogotes of the Viñales Valley.

ROOMS.TITLE: You may be interested
ROOMS.DESCRIPTION: Discover Viñales with our exciting excursions. Unforgettable adventures in a unique natural environment await you!

PACKAGES.TITLE: Available offers
PACKAGES.DESCRIPTION: Discover our promotional packages and save while enjoying exclusive offers designed for you. Take advantage now!

REQUEST_STATUS.SUCCESS_MSG_1: Your booking request has been successfully submitted. You will receive a confirmation via the provided email address within a maximum of 24 hours.
REQUEST_STATUS.SUCCESS_MSG_2: If you have any other requests or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us.
REQUEST_STATUS.ERROR_MSG_1: We experienced a technical issue while processing your request automatically.
